rulings.Case Title: ADVERTISING DISPLAY SYSTEMS 1, LLC, A CALIFORNIA VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CHARTERED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing On Respondents City And County Of San Francisco, San Francisco Planning Department, And San Francisco Zoning Administrator'S Demurrer To Petition For Writ Of Mandate/Prohibition/Certification
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, MARCH O6, 2007, LINE 15. RESPONDENTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO PLANNING DEPARTMENT AND SAN FRANCISCO ZONING ADMINISTRATOR'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/PROHIBITION/CERTIFICATION TRANSFERRED FROM DEPARTMENT 301 PER JUDGE BUSCH'S RECUSAL. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS, GOVERNMENT CODE 65009 CONTROLS. HONIG ESTABLISHES THAT PLAINTIFF CANNOT ESTABLISH ESTOPPEL. PLAINTIFF, REPRESENTED BY COUNSEL, CANNOT INVOKE ESTOPPEL BASED ON A CITY EMPLOYEE'S STATEMENT OF THE LAW. =(302/PJM/PM)
